config.name: WSPI_USE_SYNCHRONIZATION
config.brief: Support for blocking WSPI transfer APIs.

macro.name: __wspi_getconf
macro.brief: Return a pointer to the configuration structure.
macro.return: A pointer to the configuration structure.

macro.name: _wspi_wakeup_isr
macro.param: Pointer to the WSPI driver instance.

macro.name: _wspi_wakeup_isr
macro.param: Pointer to the WSPI driver instance.

macro.name: _wspi_isr_complete_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code for successful operation completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the WSPI driver instance.

macro.name: _wspi_isr_error_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code for operation errors.
macro.param: Pointer to the WSPI driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_wspi_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a WSPI driver.

typedef.name: hal_wspi_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a WSPI configuration.

typedef.name: wspi_command_t
typedef.brief: Type of a WSPI command descriptor.

struct.name: wspi_command
struct.brief: Type of a WSPI command descriptor.

field.name: dummy
field.brief: Number of dummy cycles to be inserted.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ wspi_lld_config_fields;
/* End of the mandatory fields.*/ wspi_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: wspiStartCommandI
method.brief: Sends a command without data phase.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.

method.name: wspiStartCommand
method.brief: Sends a command without data phase.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.

method.name: wspiStartSendI
method.brief: Sends a command with data over the WSPI bus.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Number of bytes to send.
Pointer to the transmit buffer.

method.name: wspiStartSend
method.brief: Sends a command with data over the WSPI bus.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Number of bytes to send.
Pointer to the transmit buffer.

method.name: wspiStartReceiveI
method.brief: Receives data from the WSPI bus.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Number of bytes to receive.
Pointer to the receive buffer.

method.name: wspiStartReceive
method.brief: Receives data from the WSPI bus.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Number of bytes to receive.
Pointer to the receive buffer.

method.name: wspiCommand
method.brief: Sends a command without data phase and waits for completion.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
method.retval: If the operation failed because HW issues.

method.name: wspiSend
method.brief: Sends a command with data over the WSPI bus and waits for completion.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Number of bytes to send.
Pointer to the transmit buffer.
method.retval: If the operation failed because HW issues.

method.name: wspiReceive
method.brief: Receives data from the WSPI bus and waits for completion.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Number of bytes to receive.
Pointer to the receive buffer.
method.retval: If the operation failed because HW issues.

method.name: wspiMapFlashI
method.brief: Maps in memory space a WSPI flash device.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Pointer to the mapped memory base address or @p NULL.

method.name: wspiMapFlash
method.brief: Maps in memory space a WSPI flash device.
method.param: Pointer to the WSPI command descriptor.
Pointer to the mapped memory base address or @p NULL.

method.name: wspiUnmapFlashI
method.brief: Unmaps a WSPI flash device from memory space.

method.name: wspiUnmapFlash
method.brief: Unmaps a WSPI flash device from memory space.
